en.extract:
The large fig parrot (Cyclopsitta desmarestii), also known as flame-headed fig parrot and Desmarest's fig parrot, is a species of parrot in the family Psittaculidae.
It is found in the West Papuan Islands, Indonesia and in southern and western New Guinea (Indonesia and Papua New Guinea).


Description
It has a red to orange cap, a light blue eye patch below its eye, yellow face, pale turquoise ring tinged with red, grey-black bill and green body. Male and female adults are identical in external appearance and juveniles tend to have duller colours on the head, but otherwise resemble adults.


Habitat
Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest, subtropical or tropical mangrove forest, and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest.


Subspecies
Five subspecies are recognised:

C. d. blythii Wallace, AR, 1864 – Misool (Raja Ampat Islands, off western New Guinea)
C. d. occidentalis (Salvadori, AT, 1876) – Salawati and Batanta Islands, western Bird's Head Peninsula, and Onin Peninsula (northwestern New Guinea)
C. d. desmarestii (Desmarest, A-G, 1826) – western New Guinea (eastern regions of Bird's Head Peninsula)
C. d. godmani (Ogilvie-Grant, WR, 1911) – southern lowlands of western and central New Guinea (Mimika River to Fly River)
C. d. cervicalis (Salvadori, AT & d'Albertis, LM, 1876) – southeastern New Guinea (Fly River to far eastern Papua New Guinea)


References

World Parrot Trust Archived 2014-07-14 at the Wayback Machine Parrot Encyclopedia - Species Profile


Cited texts
Forshaw, Joseph M. (2006). Parrots of the World; an Identification Guide. Illustrated by Frank Knight. Princeton University Press. ISBN 0-691-09251-6.

The '''large fig parrot''' ('''''Cyclopsitta desmarestii'''''), also known as '''flame-headed fig parrot''' and '''Desmarest's fig parrot''', is a species of [[parrot]] in the family [[Psittaculidae]].
It is found in the West Papuan Islands, [[Indonesia]] and in southern and western [[New Guinea]] (Indonesia and Papua New Guinea).<ref name="Forshaw (2006). plate 28.">Forshaw (2006). plate 28.</ref>

== Description ==
It has a red to orange cap, a light blue eye patch below its eye, yellow face, pale turquoise ring tinged with red, grey-black bill and green body. Male and female adults are identical in external appearance and juveniles tend to have duller colours on the head, but otherwise resemble adults.<ref name="Forshaw (2006). plate 28."/>

== Habitat ==
Its natural [[habitat]]s are [[subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest]], subtropical or tropical [[mangrove forest]], and subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]].

== Subspecies ==
Five [[subspecies]] are recognised:<ref name=avilist>{{ cite web | author=AviList Core Team | date=2025 | title=AviList: The Global Avian Checklist, v2025 | doi=10.2173/avilist.v2025 | doi-access=free | url=http://www.avilist.org/checklist/v2025/ | access-date=9 November 2025 }}</ref>
* ''C. d. blythii'' [[Alfred Russel Wallace|Wallace, AR]], 1864 – [[Misool]] ([[Raja Ampat Islands]], off western [[New Guinea]])
* ''C. d. occidentalis'' ([[Tommaso Salvadori|Salvadori, AT]], 1876) – [[Salawati]] and [[Batanta|Batanta Islands]], western [[Bird's Head Peninsula]], and Onin Peninsula (northwestern [[New Guinea]])
* ''C. d. desmarestii'' ([[Anselme Gaëtan Desmarest|Desmarest, A-G]], 1826) – western [[New Guinea]] (eastern regions of [[Bird's Head Peninsula]])
* ''C. d. godmani'' ([[William Robert Ogilvie-Grant|Ogilvie-Grant, WR]], 1911) – southern lowlands of western and central [[New Guinea]] ([[Mimika River]] to [[Fly River]])
* ''C. d. cervicalis'' (Salvadori, AT & [[Luigi D'Albertis|d'Albertis, LM]], 1876) – southeastern [[New Guinea]] ([[Fly River]] to far eastern Papua New Guinea)

==References==
{{Reflist}}

zh.extract:
大無花果鸚鵡（学名：Psittaculirostris desmarestii）又名德氏果鸚鵡或德氏無花果鸚鵡，是分布於新幾內亞西北部、南部、西南部及西北部外海幾座島嶼的一種中型鸚鵡，生活於低海拔森林或開闊林地。


特徵
全長約 18 至 20 公分，體重 108 至 126 公克。大部分體羽帶綠色調，腹部羽色較淡。頭頂呈橙色或橘紅色，胸脅部分有青色橫帶，在該橫帶下方兩側還各有一條較短的酒紅色橫帶；再下方接近雙翼的邊緣有些微的青藍色羽毛。初級飛羽黑色，帶有藍綠色邊；飛羽內側有紅色斑點。虹膜深褐色；眼先水藍色。喙呈鉛灰色。腳趾灰色。


亞種
大無花果鸚鵡指名亚种（学名：Psittaculirostris desmarestii desmarestii （Desmarest, 1826））
分布於多貝拉伊半島。頸部綠色；頰羽黃綠色。
大無花果鸚鵡米蘇爾島亚种（学名：Psittaculirostris desmarestii blythii （Wallace, 1864））
分布於米蘇爾島。頸部綠色；頰羽橙色。
大無花果鸚鵡西部亚种（学名：Psittaculirostris desmarestii occidentalis （Salvadori, 1876））
分布於多貝拉伊半島、薩拉瓦蒂島及巴丹塔島。羽色較鮮豔；頸部綠色；頰羽鮮黃色。
大無花果鸚鵡東南亚种（学名：Psittaculirostris desmarestii cervicalis （Salvadori & Albertis, 1876））
分布於弗萊河附近。頸部藍色或藍綠色；頰羽橘黃色。
大無花果鸚鵡中型亚种（学名：Psittaculirostris desmarestii intermedia （Oort, 1909））
分布於 Bomberai 半島。
大無花果鸚鵡南部亚种（学名：Psittaculirostris desmarestii godmani （Ogilvie-Grant, 1911））
分布於巴布亞省南部至弗萊河流域一帶。


叫聲
聲音清脆響亮，叫聲為連續的「chet~chet」。
